mnemonics: C.O.S.T.A.: Constraints, Objective, Simplex, Tableau, Answer
keyPoints: Used for solving Linear Programming problems
Focuses on maximizing or minimizing an objective function subject to constraints
Employs the Simplex Method through iterative tableau operations
commonMistakes: Misidentifying the entering and leaving variables in the Simplex tableau
Forgetting to convert inequality constraints into standard form equations
Incorrectly calculating the ratios for determining the pivot row
